description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a central entryway with double doors, flanked by evenly spaced windows on both floors. The exterior walls are constructed from light brown brick, and the windows are large with white frames, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is set on a rectangular plot with green lawns on both sides and a paved sidewalk and driveway leading up to the entrance. There are a few trees and shrubs placed strategically around the property, adding to its suburban appeal. The roof has several skylights, suggesting modern interior lighting and ventilation.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entryway, set on a green lawn with a paved sidewalk and driveway.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back brick wall with several windows and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side brick wall, a large window, and the driveway extending alongside the house.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entryway with double doors, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaping with trees and a sidewalk.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side brick wall, a window, and the driveway with adjacent greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a paved approach, no porch or overhang, flanked by symmetrical windows.
